<!-- DO NOT EDIT — generated by jackknife-maven-plugin. Regenerated on every `mvn jackknife:index`. -->

# Jackknife Usage

## Quick Start

Manifests have been generated in `.jackknife/manifest/` and list every class
and resource in each dependency jar. Use Grep to search them directly.

Decompiled source is generated on demand per-jar in `.jackknife/source/`.
Use the Read tool to access individual class files directly.

## Directory Structure

```
.jackknife/
├── manifest/                Lightweight class listings (all jars, sub-second)
│   └── <groupId>/
│       └── <artifact>-<version>.jar.manifest
├── source/                  Decompiled source (per-jar, on demand)
│   └── <groupId>/
│       └── <artifact>-<version>/
│           └── com/example/MyClass.java
├── instrument/              Instrumentation inbox
│   └── <groupId>/
│       └── <artifact>-<version>.jar.properties
├── modified/                Patched jars + receipts
│   └── <groupId>/
│       ├── <artifact>-<version>.jar
│       └── <artifact>-<version>.jar.properties
└── USAGE.md                 This file (regenerated, do not edit)
```

## Finding Classes

Manifests are one class name per line. Search with Grep:
```
grep -r 'CustomField' .jackknife/manifest/
```

Find resources:
```
grep -r 'META-INF/services' .jackknife/manifest/
```

## Reading Source

After running `mvn jackknife:decompile -Dclass=com.example.MyClass`,
the entire jar is decompiled. Read any class directly:
```
Read .jackknife/source/<groupId>/<artifact>-<version>/com/example/MyClass.java
```

Subsequent lookups for classes in the same jar need no Maven invocation.

## Instrumenting

```
mvn jackknife:instrument -Dmethod="com.example.Foo.process(String, int)" -Dmode=debug
```

Modes: `debug` (args + return + exceptions), `timing` (elapsed time only).
Instrumented jars applied automatically on next build.
Remove from `.jackknife/modified/` to revert.
